title: Advanced Peripherals
description: Advanced Peripherals is a mod that adds many useful extensions for CC:Tweaked(Computercraft).
body:
![haader](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Advanced_Peripherals/BH_AP_Header.png)
![overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Advanced_Peripherals/BH_AP_Overview.png)
 

Advanced Peripherals is a mod that adds many useful extensions for CC:Tweaked(Computercraft).

The mod aims to add features that were available in older minecraft versions of mods like PeripheralsPlusOne. 


With Advanced Peripherals you can control your base in Minecraft only with messages in the chat, you can develop an AI that controls your farms, you have no limits what you can create with CC:Tweaked(Computercraft) and Advanced Peripherals.


Documentation
For the full documentation you can visit https://docs.intelligence-modding.de/
